about.title: Driving Reliable Solutions for Sustainable Growth.
about.paragraph: AIM Group provides integrated contracting and project support services for the infrastructure and resource sectors. With a strong commitment to operational excellence, safety standards, and good governance practices, AIM Group ensures reliable and efficient project delivery. The company plays an active role in supporting contractor operations at Leighton Pomalaa, contributing to consistent performance and sustainable development.

slide1.title: Empowering a Sustainable Future
slide1.description: Committed to building solutions that support long-term environmental and social progress.

slide2.title: Innovating for Tomorrow
slide2.description: Driving innovation through cutting-edge technology and sustainable practices.

slide3.title: Building Strong Communities

business.breadcrumb_description: At PT AIM, we are committed to delivering innovative and sustainable business solutions across various sectors.
business.section_description: We specialize in providing end-to-end solutions that empower foundations and businesses to reach their maximum potential.
business.domain1_description: Building the backbone of modern society with reliable and sustainable infrastructure projects.
business.domain2_description: Leveraging cutting-edge AI and data analytics to solve complex operational challenges.
business.domain3_description: Providing expert strategic advice to help businesses navigate the ever-changing market landscape.

career.breadcrumb_description: Join a team that values innovation, integrity, and sustainable growth. Be a part of the AIM Group.
career.section_description: We empower our employees to grow and innovate, providing a supportive environment where ideas can flourish.
career.benefit1_description: Work on cutting-edge projects that push the boundaries of what is possible.
career.benefit2_description: We invest in our people through continuous learning and development programs.
career.benefit3_description: Join a diverse team that values unique perspectives and collaborative spirit.
career.openings_description: Join our growing team in Pomalaa, Kolaka. We focus on excellence and sustainability.
career.email_instruction: or send your application via email to: recruitment@aimgroup.id

cg.breadcrumb_description: At PT AIM, we prioritize integrity, accountability, and transparency in all our business dealings and leadership actions.
cg.section_description: We ensure sustainable growth and value for all stakeholders through robust corporate governance practices.
cg.principle1_description: We take full responsibility for our actions and decisions, ensuring alignment with stakeholder interests.
cg.principle2_description: Open communication with our stakeholders, providing clear and accurate information about our performance.
cg.principle3_description: Upholding the highest ethical standards in every transaction and interaction.
cg.principle4_description: Governance focused on long-term value creation and social responsibility.
cg.code_description: Our code of conduct provides guidance for ethical behavior and helps maintain our reputation for integrity.

footer.description: Providing integrated contracting and project support services for the infrastructure and resource sectors.
